data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement regarding the message template/payload with edit window.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement 'Message template/payload with edit window', but the provided evidence does not include any specific checks or confirmations related to this requirement. While there are multiple prior steps that indicate successful bookings and member invitations, none of them explicitly validate the message template or payload associated with the gift delivery. This indicates a gap in the evidence provided for the requirement.
gaps: No evidence confirming the message template/payload with edit window validation.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
